name: Prompt Programming for Cultural Bias and Alignment of Large Language Models

description: arXiv:2603.16827v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Culture shapes reasoning, values, prioritization, and strategic decision-making, yet large language models (LLMs) often exhibit cultural biases that misalign with target populations.
